name: Deadweight Mutagen (Major)
description:
Activate 1 Interact

For 1 hour your joints loosen and bones thicken, making your body incredibly weighty and difficult to maneuver around.

Benefit You gain a +4 item bonus to Athletics checks to and , to your Fortitude and Reflex DCs against attempts to Shove or Trip you, and to saving throws against effects that attempt to force you to move or knock you . You can attempt to Shove or Trip creatures up to three sizes larger than you.

Drawback You gain the condition and can't remove it while under the effects of the mutagen.
